comment: Act-1 Onett gate chain (Swagbound). Bosses are milady-derivatives resolved via enemy-overrides. Structure mirrors EB Onett: arcade boss -> police chief opens the road -> first Sanctuary boss. Coordinates are world pixels near the control spawn (2112,1768) and are tunable to the real arcade/police/Giant-Step spots. Boss-cleared flags are set when each fight starts (bosses block RUN). Dev: ?flags=onett:road_open to skip ahead. Dialogue text is placeholder Swagbound voice — refine freely.

dialogue: Something oily peels itself off the air. It is wearing your launch announcement as a face.
MALADY: "You minted hesitation. I mint certainty. Let's settle which one the town remembers."
The precinct's pride steps out, badge polished to a mirror, opinion already filed.
RETURNLESS KING: "No refunds, no exits, no road north. Unless you out-certainty me. Try."
Faithful servants are planted across the road north, humming the same three notes.
The precinct won't lift the line until the Returnless King says so.
At the first sanctuary the ground remembers a melody it never agreed to.
MALADY: "You made it past the gate. Cute. The Step is mine to overwrite."
